characters.name: Maya
characters.description: Живой small talk, идеи и уверенная самопрезентация.

characters.name: Noah
characters.description: Рабочие созвоны, ясные решения и спокойная аргументация.

characters.name: Amina
characters.description: Деловое общение, нетворкинг и точные формулировки.

characters.name: Leo
characters.description: Путешествия, новые знакомства и естественные истории.

characters.name: Elena
characters.description: Структурная речь, объяснения и академическая точность.

characters.name: Kai
characters.description: Питчи, переговоры и энергичное профессиональное общение.

lessons.title: New in the building
lessons.goal: Познакомиться с соседями и поддержать короткий разговор.

prompts.npc: Hey! I don't think we've met before. Are you new here?
prompts.task: Поздоровайтесь и скажите, что недавно переехали.
prompts.exampleAnswer: Hi! Nice to meet you. Yes, I just moved into the building a few days ago.

prompts.npc: Welcome! How are you finding the neighbourhood so far?
prompts.task: Поделитесь первым впечатлением и добавьте одну деталь.
prompts.exampleAnswer: So far, I really like the neighbourhood because it feels quiet and friendly.

prompts.npc: A few of us are getting coffee on Saturday. Would you like to join?
prompts.exampleAnswer: I'd love to join you for coffee on Saturday. What time are you meeting?

lessons.title: A quick team sync
lessons.goal: Уточнить статус задачи и предложить следующий шаг.

prompts.npc: Could you give me a quick update on your part of the project?
prompts.exampleAnswer: I've finished the first draft, and the main update is ready for review.

prompts.npc: Is anything blocking you at the moment?
prompts.task: Назовите одну сложность и объясните её.
prompts.exampleAnswer: The only issue is that I'm waiting for the final numbers from the design team.

prompts.npc: Okay, what do you suggest we do next?
prompts.exampleAnswer: I suggest we review the draft today and agree on the next step tomorrow.

lessons.title: Help in the city
lessons.goal: Попросить помощь, уточнить маршрут и поблагодарить.

prompts.npc: Hi there, you look a little lost. Can I help?
prompts.exampleAnswer: Thanks! I'm looking for the city museum. Could you help me find it?

prompts.npc: Sure. Go straight and turn left after the bank.
prompts.task: Переспросите, правильно ли вы поняли маршрут.
prompts.exampleAnswer: Just to make sure, did you say I should turn left after the bank?

prompts.npc: Exactly. It will be on your right. You can't miss it.
prompts.exampleAnswer: Thanks a lot. I really appreciate your help. Have a great day!

lessons.title: Coffee, please
lessons.goal: Сделать заказ, уточнить состав и вежливо завершить разговор.

prompts.npc: Hi! What can I get for you today?
prompts.exampleAnswer: Could I have a medium oat latte, please?

prompts.npc: Of course. Would you like regular milk or oat milk?
prompts.task: Выберите вариант и уточните, есть ли сахар.
prompts.exampleAnswer: I'd prefer oat milk. Does it come with any sugar?

prompts.npc: No sugar by default. Your total is five dollars.
prompts.exampleAnswer: Great, I'll pay by card. Thank you!

lessons.title: Meet someone new
lessons.goal: Представиться, рассказать о своей работе и продолжить знакомство.

prompts.npc: Hi, I don't think we've met. What brings you to this event?
prompts.task: Представьтесь и объясните, почему вы пришли.
prompts.exampleAnswer: Hi, I'm Anna. I work in education, and I'm here to meet people working on language projects.

prompts.npc: That sounds interesting. What are you working on at the moment?
prompts.exampleAnswer: At the moment, I'm building a project that helps students practise real conversations.

prompts.npc: I'd love to hear more. Shall we exchange contacts?
prompts.exampleAnswer: That would be great. You can reach me by email, or we can connect on LinkedIn.

lessons.title: Hotel check-in
lessons.goal: Заселиться в отель, уточнить детали и решить небольшую проблему.

prompts.npc: Good evening. Do you have a reservation with us?
prompts.exampleAnswer: Good evening. I have a reservation, and it's under the name Petrova.

prompts.npc: I found it. Breakfast is served from seven to ten. Is there anything else you need?
prompts.task: Уточните, включён ли завтрак в стоимость.
prompts.exampleAnswer: Could you confirm whether breakfast is included in the room price?

prompts.npc: Yes, it is included. Your room is on the fourth floor.
prompts.task: Сообщите, что вам нужен тихий номер, и вежливо попросите проверить.
prompts.exampleAnswer: I was hoping for a quiet room. Could you check whether this one is away from the lift?
